en:
As part of your client requirements, you will be asked to upload your relevant insurance documentation. If you do not have any active insurance related tasks to complete, the reason for that may be:

1. Your connected Client(s) are finalizing those requirements which will be forthcoming
2. Client is reviewing your recent connection to determine the specific insurance requirements for your company
3. You may have another form in Avetta before your insurance requirements are ready for your submission (e.g. specific questionnaire)

Besides starting and completing your available tasks in Avetta, you may reach out to your agent/broker with any applicable agreement from your client to review your coverage needs.
